---
title: "Seasonality in tbc"
author: "Najma Moallin"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(opr)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(gt)
library(here)
library(arrow)

#| label: connect
con <- connect_bq()
```

```{r}
#| label: extract-data
#| eval: true
#| cache: true
bnf_code_amoxicillin <- "0501013B0%"

df_prescribing <- get_normalised_prescribing(
  con,
  bnf_codes = bnf_code_amoxicillin,
  start_date = "2024-03-01",
  end_date = "2024-04-30"
) |>
  select(month, practice, bnf_code, bnf_name, items, quantity) |>
  collect()

df_practices <- get_practices(con, filter_setting = 4) |>
  collect()

write_parquet(
  df_prescribing,
  here("data-raw", "example", "df_amoxicillin_prescribing_032024.parquet")
)

write_parquet(
  df_practices,
  here("data-raw", "example", "najma_df_practices.parquet")
)
```


```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| eval: false
df_prescribing <- read_parquet(
  here("data-raw", "example", "df_amoxicillin_prescribing_032024.parquet")
)

df_practices <- read_parquet(
  here("data-raw", "example", "najma_df_practices.parquet")
)
```
